Credit VivoLive credit. Clear path.

Portal updates ready

Customer message flow

Portal messages are available for testing. Email and text delivery are shown as launch-ready previews and remain disabled until vendors and consent controls are connected.

Test Customer

test.customer@example.com - Case CV-2026-0623-TESTCUST

Portal: OnEmail preview: OnText preview: Off

Message Previews

Your Credit Vivo upload was receivedReady in portal

Portal to test.customer@example.com

Hi Test, we received your credit report and started your Credit Vivo review. Your dashboard will show simple updates as the case moves forward.

Your credit report findings are readyPreview ready

Email preview to test.customer@example.com

Hi Test, your first findings are ready. We found possible account reporting issues and document items to confirm before dispute drafts are finalized.

Upload reminderText disabled

Text preview to test.customer@example.com

Credit Vivo: Please upload your ID and proof of address when you have a moment. Text replies will be available after launch setup is complete.

Next step: review your dispute draftsQueued for Day 3

Email preview to test.customer@example.com

Hi Test, once your identity documents are uploaded, we can prepare dispute drafts for your review inside the portal.

Your monthly Credit Vivo update is readyMonthly update ready

Portal + email preview to test.customer@example.com

Hi Test, your monthly update is ready. It shows score movement when available, work completed this month, items waiting on responses, and your next best actions.

Open monthly update

Portal Updates

Report upload received

Test, your credit report was added to the review queue.

Portal - Today 9:10 AM
Initial review completed

We found possible reporting issues that need confirmation before disputes are prepared.

Portal - Today 9:12 AM
Review summary ready

A plain-English summary is ready for test.customer@example.com. Email delivery is disabled until launch setup is complete.

Email preview - Today 9:14 AM
Follow-up reminder queued

Reminder prepared: upload ID and proof of address if identity cleanup should be included.

Text preview - Tomorrow

Test Consumers

Create another test consumer

External Sending

Coming soon

Real sending will need consent records, unsubscribe controls, delivery logs, and a provider like SendGrid, Mailgun, Postmark, Twilio, or another compliant vendor.

Preview the monthly update page
Credit Vivo

Results vary. Credit Vivo does not guarantee removals, approvals, or credit score increases. You may dispute inaccurate credit report information directly with the credit bureaus at no cost.
